taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence Engineer
core_skills: Applied AI, Software Engineering, Python, AI tools integration, AI libraries
skill_match_scores: Applied AI:1.0, Software Engineering:1.0, Python:1.0, AI tools integration:1.0, AI libraries:1.0
must_have_quals: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field, 2–4 years of experience in software engineering or applied AI, Proficiency in Python for production-level code, Experience integrating AI tools, libraries, or model APIs, Strong communication skills to work effectively with teams, Ability to work onsite full-time, Familiarity with structured development environments
preferred_quals: Experience with AWS services (EC2, Lambda, S3, Bedrock), Exposure to Docker, CI/CD, MLOps, Familiarity with enterprise data pipelines or responsible AI practices, Experience with ETL, PySpark, or similar data engineering tools
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain Python-based AI tools, scripts, and automation solutions, Integrate AI libraries, model APIs, or existing AI services into operational workflows, Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand requirements and deliver reliable solutions, Participate in code reviews, CI/CD pipelines, and MLOps practices for production deployment, Document processes, architecture, and AI implementations for long-term maintainability, Monitor and troubleshoot deployed AI solutions to ensure quality and performance
job_summary: ALTEN Technology USA is an engineering company helping clients bring groundbreaking ideas to life. The AI-Enabled Software Engineer will focus on developing and delivering production-ready AI solutions, collaborating with cross-functional teams and integrating AI tools into operational workflows.
